headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on SBA Communications, Raises Price Target to $230
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Maher Yaghi   maintains SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $223 to $230.

headline: Mobile World Congress 2026: Towercos Take Center Stage
summary: Towercos have increased their presence at Mobile World Congress in 2026, reflecting their growing relevance as key infrastructure providers for the industry. Read more here.

headline: How Investors May Respond To SBA Communications (SBAC) Dividend Hike And Upgraded 2026 Outlook
summary: SBA Communications Corporation recently reported first-quarter 2026 results, with sales of US$656.15 million and total revenue of US$703.44 million, while net income declined to US$184.83 million and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations slipped to US$1.74 compared with the prior year. Alongside the earnings release, management raised its full-year outlook, increased the quarterly dividend by about 13%, and outlined plans for an inaugural investment-grade bond issuance,...

headline: A Look At SBA Communications (SBAC) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance and what it might signal SBA Communications (SBAC) has gained attention after a month return of 28.5% and a past 3 months return of 20.1%, contrasting with a 1 year total return of a 6.1% decline. See our latest analysis for SBA Communications. Recent gains, including a 28.5% 30 day share price return and a 20.1% 90 day share price return, sit against a 6.1% 1 year total shareholder return decline. This suggests momentum has picked up after a weaker longer term stretch. If...
